text: 2086 - رَوَى اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «لاَ اِعْتِكَافَ إِلاَّ بِصَوْمٍ فِي مَسْجِدِ اَلْجَامِعِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2086 - It is narrated by Al-Halabi from Abu Abdullah (as) that he said:
"There is no valid i'tikaf (spiritual retreat) except with fasting and in a congregational mosque."
